question: Who scored the most goals?
sql: SELECT player_name, team_name, SUM(goals) as total_goals FROM player_match[12D[K player_match_stats GROUP BY player_name, team_name ORDER BY total_goals DES[3D[K DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which players had the highest expected goals (xG)?
sql: SELECT player_name, team_name, ROUND(SUM(statsbomb_xg), 3) as total_xg FRO[3D[K FROM shots GROUP BY player_name, team_name ORDER BY total_xg DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the average pass accuracy for each team?
sql: SELECT team_name, ROUND(AVG(pass_accuracy), 2) as avg_pass_accuracy FROM t[1D[K team_match_stats GROUP BY team_name

question: Which players completed the most dribbles?
sql: SELECT player_name, team_name, SUM(dribbles) as total_dribbles FROM player[6D[K player_match_stats GROUP BY player_name, team_name ORDER BY total_dribbles [K DESC

question: Which team applied the most pressing pressure?
sql: SELECT team_name, SUM(pressures) as total_pressures FROM team_match_stats [K GROUP BY team_name ORDER BY total_pressures DESC

question: Who had the most assists and key passes?
sql: SELECT player_name, team_name, SUM(assists) as total_assists, SUM(key_pass[12D[K SUM(key_passes) as total_key_passes FROM player_match_stats GROUP BY player[6D[K player_name, team_name ORDER BY total_assists + total_key_passes DESC LIMIT[5D[K LIMIT 10
